title: [Cloud] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Voyager Legend 50/30 paired directly (not via Charge Case) displays correctly as standalone earpiece in Poly Studio Mobile app and cloud web portal
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the '+' icon or 'Add Device' to begin pairing.
3. Put the Poly Voyager Legend 50 / Voyager Legend 30 headset into pairing mode (press and hold the Power/Bluetooth button until the LED flashes red/blue).
4. From the list of available devices, select the headset to pair it directly (not via a Charge Case).
5. Confirm the headset appears on the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Log in to the Poly cloud web portal (e.g., Poly Lens or Poly+).
7. Navigate to the Devices section and locate the paired headset.
8. Verify the device name is displayed as 'Voyager Legend 50' or 'Voyager Legend 30'.
9. Click on the device to open its details page.
10. Confirm that only earpiece-related information and an image of the earpiece are shown (no case or charging cradle details).
expected: The headset connects directly to the app without requiring a Charge Case. The cloud web portal displays the device as "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30". The device details page shows only earpiece info and image.
